project.description: Import the GPAD file that comes from Noctua (GO) and contains Zebrafish-related annotations

hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.name: SKIP_DOWNLOAD_IF_UNCHANGED
hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.description: This will skip the download and execution if the upstream file is unchanged from last run

hudson.tasks.Shell.command: set -e # Capture the BEFORE snapshot of Noctua marker_go_term_evidence (artifact). OUT=$TARGETROOT/server_apps/DB_maintenance/gafLoad/Load-GPAD-Noctua_w SQL=$SOURCEROOT/server_apps/DB_maintenance/gafLoad mkdir -p "$OUT" PSQL="psql -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -h $PGHOST -d $DBNAME" $PSQL -v org=Noctua -v stage=tmp_gpad_mgoe_before -f $SQL/snapshot_mgte.sql $PSQL -c "\copy (SELECT * FROM tmp_gpad_mgoe_before ORDER BY zdb_id) TO STDOUT CSV HEADER" > "$OUT/mgoe_before.csv" echo "BEFORE snapshot rows: $(( $(wc -l < "$OUT/mgoe_before.csv") - 1 ))"

set -e # Capture the AFTER snapshot (post-load) and produce the database-level diff. OUT=$TARGETROOT/server_apps/DB_maintenance/gafLoad/Load-GPAD-Noctua_w SQL=$SOURCEROOT/server_apps/DB_maintenance/gafLoad PSQL="psql -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -h $PGHOST -d $DBNAME" $PSQL -v org=Noctua -v stage=tmp_gpad_mgoe_after -f $SQL/snapshot_mgte.sql $PSQL -c "\copy (SELECT * FROM tmp_gpad_mgoe_after ORDER BY zdb_id) TO STDOUT CSV HEADER" > "$OUT/mgoe_after.csv" $PSQL -c "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_gpad_mgoe_before, tmp_gpad_mgoe_after"
cd $SOURCEROOT
# Row-level (database) diff: key = every column except zdb_id, ignore zdb_id so a # row that only got a recycled id lands in updates_ignored rather than add+delete. # CSVDIFF_XLSX_ONLY -> single mgoe_dbdiff.xlsx workbook (deletes/adds/updated_1/ # updated_2 sheets); the intermediate CSVs are removed. export CSVDIFF_XLSX_ONLY=true gradle csvDiff --args="$OUT/mgoe_dbdiff $OUT/mgoe_before.csv $OUT/mgoe_after.csv marker,term,source,evidence,relation,created_by,contributed_by,protein_acc,inferred_from,annotation_extensions,noctua_model zdb_id"
